raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 424 aims to streamline the process of information provided to individuals filing complaints about facilities to the State Department of Health Care Services.",
    "AB 424 will require the State Department of Health Care Services to notify complainants within 10 days of receipt and completion of the review of the complaint.",
    "A state audit found that 22 complaints took more than a year to investigate.",
    "AB 425 would require all substance use disorder recovery or treatment programs to adopt routine measures with evidence-based practices as minimum standards.",
    "Currently, standards for licensed facilities and certified programs differ unnecessarily."
  ]
}
```
